items: Roll Call
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
Approval of Agenda

If you have public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Measure S Bond Program Update and Approval of Key Analytics Financial System for the Bond Program
Special Education Study Report Presentation and Study Report Implementation Presentation
Board of Trustees Graduation/Promotions Assignments for the 2023-24 SY
Approval of Consent Items
Approval of the April 3 Board Meeting Minutes
Approval of the Addendum to McKinley Institute of Technology (MIT) 2023-24 Measure U Application
Approval of the Addendum to Taft's 2023-24 Measure U Application
Approval of the Addendum to Clifford's 2023-24 Measure U Application
Approval of 2023-24 Measure U Application for KIPP Excelencia Community Prep Charter School
Approval of Agreement between The San Mateo County Superintendent of Schools and Redwood City School District for the SMCOE/ALDER GSE Teacher Residency Program for the 24-25 School Year
Approval of Declaration of Need for 2024-2025
Ratification of Warrant Registers, March 1, 2024 - March 31, 2024
Approval of Personnel Report
Adoption of Resolution #10, Resolution to Approve Standards for Local Certification of Universal Transitional Kindergarten Teachers
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Contract Update Information and Credit Card Summary
Quarterly Williams Report, 3rd Quarter, January 2024 through March 2024
Correspondence
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar
Adjourn the Meeting

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to agenda announced during early portion of meeting. Board President Lawson asked 'do we have any changes to the agenda' and received response 'no oral communication.' Motion to approve agenda was made and passed without modifications.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll make a motion to approve it I'll second thank you all those in favor I thank you
